features: ✂【High Grade Hair Scrunchies Material】Our hair scrunchies are made of premium quality imitation silk fabric, Handmade, Soft and Silky to touch that won't pull or tug on your delicate strands. There is an closed elastic hair tie inside the silk scrunchies, no knots, will never snapped.

✂【Silk Scrunchies Size】Compared to ordinary silk satin scrunchies, our silk scrunchies are lengthened and widened, The longest stretch can reach 27cm, The widest point is 4.5cm, make it look fuller when worn on your hair.

✂【Perfect Hair Accessories for Women】Our silk scrunchies for hair are carefully selected in 7 different popular colors, the hair scrunchies are not only great hair accessories, but you can also wear them around your wrist as a stylish bracelet. During the 7 days of the week, you can choose 7 different colors scrunchies based on your daily mood and clothing.

✂【Features of The Hair Scrunchies】The hair scrunchies for women has an excellent stretch, not too tight or too loose, the satin scrunchies can grip into your hair really well without loosening or falling down. they can stay in place well and are suitable for all hair types.

✂【Necessary for Women Girls】 These colorful satin scrunchies can be used in a variety of occasions, such as wedding, parties, ceremonies or daily wearing. You can give it to family, friends, colleagues as gift or just spoil yourself! If you have any dissatisfaction, please contact us promptly
description: Product description FZHGVML Silk Scrunchies Set Comes in Seven Colors, Necessary for Women Girls Hair Accessories for Women Girls Set Include : ➤1 x Champagne Silk Scrunchies ➤1 x Khaki Silk Scrunchies ➤1 x Purple Silk Scrunchies ➤1 x Black Silk Scrunchies ➤1 x Navy Silk Scrunchies ➤1 x Wine Red Silk Scrunchies ➤1 x Peacock Blue Silk Scrunchies ❤High Grade Satin Scrunchies Material : Our hair scrunchies are made of premium quality imitation silk fabric, Handmade, Soft and Silky to touch. ✦Features of The Hair Scrunchies : 👌 There is an closed elastic hair tie inside the silk scrunchies, no knots, will never snapped. 👌 Soft and Silky to touch that won't pull or tug on your delicate strands. 👌 The treatment of lengthening and widening allows you to easily handle various hairstyles. Directions 1. Pull your hair into a ponytail or gather the section you want to secure. 2. Place the scrunchie around the base of the ponytail or hair section. 3. Adjust the tightness by pulling the ends of the scrunchie to ensure a secure hold without pulling on your hair. 4. For a bun, wrap the ponytail around the base and secure with the scrunchie. 5. For a more polished look, smooth down the fabric to ensure it lies flat and does not create bumps. To prolong the lifespan of the scrunchies, avoid over-tightening and store them in a cool, dry place.
